The Product

Not just a sports drink.
A juice replacement.

Battle Juice competes in three purchase occasions: sports hydration, juice at lunch, and juice drinks like Sunny D. Three reasons to buy — three shelf positions to own.

6 Flavors — Each with a collectible fighter character

Lemon Burst
Orange Smash
Fruit Punch
Tropical K.O.
Blue Rush
Apple Kick

What’s in it

700+ mg electrolytes — potassium, magnesium, sodium
Organic allulose + organic stevia — zero added sugar
Organic fruit juice concentrates — real flavor
No artificial colors, flavors, or ingredients
15–20 calories per 11 fl oz bottle
MSRP $2.49  ·  Wholesale $1.25  ·  11 fl oz PET  ·  Case of 12

Expanding the Line

Kool-Aid without
the bullsh*t.

Battle Juice powder sticks bring the same clean formula to the electrolyte powder category — targeting Amazon Grocery and TikTok Shop. Same brand. Same characters. Zero sugar. Superior margins.
